overall.description: A cinematic game engine rendering of a gothic great hall at night, featuring hundreds of floating candles illuminating long dining tables where students are seated. The camera maintains a static elevated perspective overlooking the hall, with large windows at the far end revealing a cloudy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with floating candles and dining tables

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the great hall interior from an elevated vantage point overlooking the dining area

notable_agents.action: students seated at long wooden tables dining and conversing

entered.detail: large cylindrical stone pillar with carved details in the immediate left foreground
hundreds of lit candles suspended in mid-air at various heights throughout the hall ceiling
rows of long wooden banquet tables with benches arranged lengthwise through the hall
tall arched windows with stone tracery at the far end of the hall
dark blue night sky with animated clouds visible through the far windows
series of stone arches along the right wall with warm torch lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady elevated view of a vast gothic great hall illuminated by hundreds of floating candles. Long wooden dining tables fill the space with seated students, while massive arched windows at the far end reveal a cloudy night sky. The atmosphere is warm and magical, with candlelight flickering against the stone architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, elevated perspective of a vast gothic great hall, capturing a singular moment of magical stillness. It begins with a wide view of the cavernous space, where hundreds of floating candles cast a warm, flickering glow against the heavy stone architecture. As the camera holds its position, the light dances across long wooden dining tables filled with seated students, emphasizing the scale of the interior. The scene then draws the eye toward the far end of the hall, where massive arched windows frame a contrasting, cloudy night sky.
